content:
A couple of patches ago in the English translation for the game long messages were given a scroll instead of continuing on a second window and I would like to request this change be reverted. The scroll has become problematic in several ways.

Scenario 1: The text often scrolls before the player is given time to properly take in what has been said, requiring the player to check the logs to re-read it and breaking immersion.

Scenario 2: The game does not allow you to proceed to the next dialogue box until the scroll has finished. This becomes a problem when simple, easy to understand sentences are written and you want to advance to the next dialogue window but have to wait for the scroll to finish in order to do so.

Both of these scenarios are very obnoxious and have a negative impact on the experience of players and were not a problem with the old system of spilling over into a new dialogue window. I know that I am not the only player bothered by this, I have seen several others complain about this feature; including players new to the game who hadn't played using the old system. Please revert this change to maintain immersion in the story.
Yeah, is not very effective, it really need a scroll feature to work

I agree, it's worse than just having to click once to get to the next part of the line. Either it scrolls too slowly and I'm waiting long past the point I have finished reading, or I click and it scrolls immediately to the bottom and I have to open up the text log to see what I missed. Both break the flow of the story. If there was some option to personally move the text up and down to see the lines (as there is in some parts of the game) then it would maybe work ok, but otherwise I think it was better the way it was before
Definitely needs a better way of communicating text, the story is one of the main reasons to play and it’s jarring having to constantly check the logs
That also doesn’t help when certain paragraphs are lovecraft language and becomes triangles in the logs
如影片，突然就必須選牌刪除才讓我過去

content:
A thing I heard a lot of people say is that the first battle of Dtide is very hard (because you don't have resources to start, more relics etc) and then, if you can survive it, the rest can be more manageable.
Wouldn't be possible to, potentially, reduce the strength of the very first encounter by around 25\20% (as in stats or even composition)? 
To give teams that maybe struggle more right at start, a better chance to build up and play the level?
If that is too easy one can increase the difficulty of the general stage slightly to compensate, but maybe that can increase the potential variety of usable teams, or at least alleviate the initial frustration from that first fight.
What is **Your Opinion?**

接触这个游戏也有一段时间了，这一段时间的游玩体验还是比较不错的。但是有一点还是让我觉得有点难受，就是有些角色的某个启灵乃至超限爆发机制过于特殊，导致是否拥有这个启灵/超限爆发让拥有这个角色的体验完全两极分化，特别是有些角色可能没有拿到关键启灵就完全上不了场。而融灾又考察玩家的BOX深度，可能你的低启角色完全没有环境上场。希望之后的角色设计可以不要将角色的关键机制拆分到启灵之中（比如<减费>和<保留>这种比较重要的机制），而是更多地将数值部分的内容添加到启灵中去。当然超限爆发需要一些特殊机制也是无可厚非的，但是不要像塔薇和熔朵那样过于依赖超限爆发。这样做一方面照顾到了新手玩家的抽卡压力，另一方面让愿意投入资源抽卡的玩家也能够看到自己的投入转化为实打实的提升。
    我还是希望忘却前夜能够更加长久而稳定地运营下去，给更多卡牌爱好者们带来乐趣。希望策划可以稍微考虑一下我的建议，谢谢。<:agree:1400771815076528258>
